Defendants Jewish Senior Living Group, The San Francisco Campus For Jewish Living'S Motion To Compel Arbitration (Per Order Re: Joint Stipulation Filed 12/7/2020)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendants, Jewish Senior Living Group, The San Francisco Campus For Jewish Living's Motion To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. See Word (.doc) minutes and/or written order for a detailed and complete version of the court's ruling and findings. Written order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceedings are not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Continued To Feb-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Claims, Or In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Attorney, Olivia Florio Roberts of the law offices of Litter Mendelson (OFlorioRoberts@littler.com) appears as counsel for moving party, defendant Jewish Senior Living Group

No other appearance is made in this matter

DEFENDANTs JEWISH SENIOR LIVING GROUP, THE SAN FRANCISCO CAMPUS FOR JEWISH LIVING's Motion In Support Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Claims, Or In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings is ordered off calendar. Defendants shall either (1) provide complete copies of all employee handbooks containing arbitration agreements that they rely upon or (2) state that the handbooks no longer exist.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com.
